---
title: "Rafael N. Magalhães"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/logo.png
  image-width: 45%
  image-shape: "rectangle"
---

I am an [applied scientist](about.html) employing probabilistic models, machine learning, and causal inference to measure impact and quantify uncertainty in strategic decision-making.

Explore my [consulting work](consulting.html), [open-source](code.html) projects, and [teaching materials](teaching.html).
